reviews.review_description: Classic Feel With Classic Sounds! Amazing & Priced Right! Gameplay is bob on, tough but not that tough you don't come back. Leader Boards are alive & rocking with Me & other players jostling for top positions! GGs

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review blue. Keep on jostling! You can watch me take on the top scores here;  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLeYEIdTgw8TtuNGRx91p3h9murC4B0fzl

reviews.review_description: This is a simple Geometry Wars style arcade shooter on Quest. Games like this and Vampire Survivors are big now. That said, I bought this because the dev is small and mentioned in another review that they might add more visual flairs to make this more exciting in VR. More 3D and effects. If that's the case, here's my support. Go effects crazy, please!

developer_response.body: I loved Geometry Wars! Thanks for the review and your support. I made a small update on the 15th that made the big explosions pop the same as the video trailer. Feel free to post any suggestions over at the new Discord channel!; https://discord.gg/TrURQR72p5

reviews.review_description: Modern meets retro in this fun action-packed bullet hell game. Big thanks to the dev for providing 3 codes to giveaway in my best of App Lab video: https://youtu.be/ZNFV4r8MAYw

developer_response.body: Great series, thanks for including Cosmic Survivor. Pro tip for anyone wanting to beat VRReviews score; Hold the Grip button to enter special mode!

reviews.review_description:
Like being immersed in an arcade cabinet in a good way. Love the music as well. The UI is a bit low down so it's difficult to track while the action is happening but not a deal breaker. Maybe the left controller could have a function as well potentially?

Progression is a bit fast as in hectic quick, maybe I am just a noob at old arcade games though.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Shaunski! It is brutal for beginners... Hopefully it hasn't put you off from trying again. You get better with time as you figure out the dangers and survival strategies. Don't forget to use the Charged Shot and Power Mode!

reviews.review_description: Awesome little retro rogue-lite space shooter. Just one more game!!!  🤣👍

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words... that's the reaction I was hoping for!

reviews.review_description:
Great game. Very similar to Geometry wars, in feel and pace, but with a progress system that gives you much more firepower. 

Ace for a quick blast, or so you think after your 50th utterance of 'just one more go' 🤣

At the price, this is an absolute steal!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support and the leaderboard competition! It's getting dizzy up here XD

reviews.review_description:
This is a lot of fun and keeps you coming back to beat your score or climb the leaderboard.

Looking at the video before playing, I was hoping for more 3-D effects to take advantage of the VR, but that is a minor quibble.

Well worth the asking price!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and comments! Yeah, I did reduce the particle explosions after the video was taken to help framerate later on when it get's really hectic, but there's no reason they can't be full on at the beginning. I'll buff them next update!
